description: Suitable for Band 5.0–6.0 target. Clear tasks with well-defined data and straightforward essay structures.

task1.title: Bar Chart — Internet Usage
task1.description: The bar chart below shows the percentage of people in different age groups who used the internet daily in the UK in 2020.
tips: Start with an overview — pick the most striking trend
Group age groups logically (young vs older)
Avoid opinions or explanations — just describe

structure.label: Introduction
structure.desc: Paraphrase the task. Do NOT copy the prompt.

structure.label: Body 1
structure.desc: Describe 2-3 specific data points with figures.

structure.label: Body 2
structure.desc: Compare or contrast remaining groups with figures.

task2.title: Opinion Essay — Technology in Education
task2.question: Some people believe that technology has made education better, while others think it has had a negative impact. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
tips: State your position clearly in the introduction
Give ONE clear opinion — don't sit on the fence
Support each body paragraph with an example
Paraphrase the question — never copy it

structure.label: Body 1
structure.desc: Main reason supporting your view + example.

keyPhrases: While some argue that …, I contend that …
